documentation.value: Calls a mixin with the specified arguments. Mixins allow reusing groups of CSS properties.
The first parameter passed to the mixin.
The second parameter passed to the mixin.
Parses a color string and returns a color value. Accepts hex, rgb, rgba, hsl, and named colors.
A string representing a color (e.g., '#ff0000', 'red').
Decreases the lightness of a color by the specified percentage.
The base color to darken.
The percentage to decrease lightness (0-100%).
Increases the lightness of a color by the specified percentage.
The base color to lighten.
The percentage to increase lightness (0-100%).
Converts a unitless number into a percentage. For example, percentage(0.5) returns 50%.
A unitless number to convert (e.g., 0.5 becomes 50%).
Removes or changes the unit of a dimension. If @unit is specified, changes to that unit.
A number with a unit (e.g., 5px).
Optional target unit string (e.g., 'rem', 'em').
Returns the number of elements in a comma or space separated list.
A Less list value.
Returns the value at the specified position in a list. Index is 1-based.
A Less list value.
The 1-based index of the element to extract.
Returns @trueValue if @condition evaluates to true, otherwise returns @falseValue.
A boolean expression to evaluate.
Value returned when the condition is true.
Value returned when the condition is false.
Iterates over a list, applying the ruleset for each element. Binds @value, @key, and @index.
A Less list or map to iterate over.
A detached ruleset to apply for each element.
